description_long: This futuristic shotgun features a sleek, angular body with a predominantly matte gray finish accented by bold red and gold lines running along its sides. The weapon has a robust, industrial design with a prominent dual-barrel configuration, each barrel encased in a protective shroud and highlighted by red detailing. The stock is minimalistic, with a skeletal structure that appears lightweight yet sturdy, and the grip is integrated seamlessly into the body. The top of the shotgun includes a raised sight rail, and the trigger guard is elongated and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Mechanical and electronic components are visible, suggesting advanced functionality, while the overall form is compact and ergonomic for urban combat scenarios. The combination of metallic and synthetic materials gives it a high-tech, durable appearance suitable for modern or near-future settings.
description: A sleek, dual-barrel futuristic shotgun with a matte gray body, red and gold accents, and a minimalistic skeletal stock. Its angular design and visible mechanical details suggest advanced, durable construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels encased in a protective shroud, with red highlights and a narrow, angular profile.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, gold and red accent lines, and the skeletal stock structure.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the minimalistic stock and the elongated, squared trigger guard, with the barrels barely visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the dual barrels, accent lines, and mechanical details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: over-under double-barrel, both barrels encased in a protective shroud with red highlights
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated and squared, providing ample space, with a robust and reinforced appearance
